title: Default policy
subtitle: Auto-apply this rule set to repositories you connect from now on.
helper: When you connect a new repository, these rules become its initial active policy. Existing repositories aren't changed.

enabled.title: Auto-apply on connect
enabled.description: Toggle off to keep the template saved without applying it to new repositories.
enabled.toggleLabel: Apply this template to newly connected repositories

rulesDescription: Add one rule per commit-message check.
hasErrors: Fix the highlighted rules before saving.

clearDialog.title: Clear default policy?
clearDialog.description: Newly connected repositories won't get an auto-applied policy. Existing repositories keep their current policies.
